text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Unfortunately the landscape has changed quite a bit since this 
PR was submitted. If you are still interested in this topic 
please feel free to submit a new PR relevant to the current 
state of the code in version 9.4.x or higher (9.6.x would 
actually be preferred). 


Doug 

PS, it's should also be pointed out that this topic is better
covered in 122974.
